sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ خَالِدٌ كَمُصَمِّمٍ لِلْمُحْتَوَى التَّعْلِيمِيِّ عَلَى مَوْقِعِ يُوتِيُوب.
sentences.translation: Khalid radi kao kreator obrazovnog sadržaja na YouTube-u.
sentences.translationEn: Khalid works as an educational content creator on YouTube.

sentences.arabic: هُوَ يُصَوِّرُ مَقَاطِعَ فِيدْيُو تَشْرَحُ قَوَاعِدَ اللُّغَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ بِبَسَاطَةٍ.
sentences.translation: On snima video snimke koji jednostavno objašnjavaju pravila arapskog jezika.
sentences.translationEn: He films video clips that explain Arabic grammar rules simply.

sentences.arabic: يُتَابِعُهُ آلَافُ الطُّلَّابِ مِنَ الدُّوَلِ الْمُخْتَلِفَةِ لِيَتَعَلَّمُوا مِنْهُ.
sentences.translation: Prate ga hiljade studenata iz različitih zemalja kako bi učili od njega.
sentences.translationEn: Thousands of students from different countries follow him to learn from him.
